sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Kirby is able to swim in water sections

special_mechanics.name: Flying
special_mechanics.description: Kirby can fly throughout a variety of levels

special_mechanics.name: Inhale
special_mechanics.description: Kirby can absorb enemies and gain their copy abilities

special_mechanics.name: Animal Friends
special_mechanics.description: Six animal friends that alter Kirby's powers and movement drastically

physics_values.documented_friends: Nago and others mentioned, specific physics not documented

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. No specific movement physics values (gravity, acceleration, jump velocity) are documented in available sources. Debug mode information available (ROM address $387E) but does not contain physics parameters. Movement capabilities described qualitatively: walking, swimming, flying, floating. Game emphasizes mobility through multiple movement types and animal companions that modify physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Kirby's Dream Land 3 (debug mode and general game info)
